title: Salutation
description: Backport of the Modern Command System
body:
Salutation is a backport of Minecrafts Command line Auto complete system.    
Which was originally backported for Chunk Pregenerator,    
but due to request it will now be a standalone mod.    

It also contains a Mini Version of Brigardier with a ton of Debloating.    
Instead of a Tree Building system it is a Stack based system.    
Which only changes how you build the commands.    
And makes command building a ton easier.
